LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF MST CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S NOTICE OF APPEAL & HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. FAILURE TO DEMONSTRATE LIKEHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING COUNSEL OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND ARGUE. AS A RESULT THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558

Ntc Of Appl & Hrg For Right To Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: Ronald Brown, Esq., 949-250-3322 for plaintiff and moving party MST CONSTRUCTION,INC., A TEXAS CONSTRUCTION

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
PLAINTIFF MST CONSTRUCTION,INC.,A TEXAS CONSTRUCTION'S Notice Of Appeal & Hearing For Right To Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is denied. Failure to demonstrate likehood of success on the merits. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING COUNSEL OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AND ARGUE. AS A RESULT THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DS)
